message:
feat: add CLI validation and JSON explain output

CLI improvements:
- Add validate_expiration_date() for ISO 8601/RFC 3339 formats
- Add validate_condition() for KEY=VALUE format
- Fix inefficient allowlist loading (load once instead of per-layer)
- Add tests for validation functions

Trace JSON output (git_safety_guard-1gt.1.3 prep):
- Add format_json() and to_json_output() methods
- Add EXPLAIN_JSON_SCHEMA_VERSION for versioning
- Add JSON schema types (ExplainJsonOutput, JsonTraceStep, etc.)
- Export new types from lib.rs

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
